name: mcp-tools-plugin
description: OMP extensions for the mcp-tools ecosystem: MCP tool-routing enforcement (serena/tokensave/codebase-memory/mem0) and post-task maintenance nudges.

omp.name: mcp-tools-plugin
omp.description: Force-routes code intelligence work to connected MCP servers (serena/tokensave/codebase-memory/mem0) instead of native tools, at the code level. Adds a post-task maintenance nudge after mutating turns.
